---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature for Kaup
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Who has this problem?

## Proposed Solution

How should this feature work? Describe the user flow.

## Alternatives Considered

Any other solutions you thought of?

## Why This Matters

Why is this valuable to include in Kaup? How does it align with the project's
goals (offline-first, open-source, no vendor lock-in)?

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or examples.
